features.name: User Authentication (Login/Register/Logout)

features.name: Dashboard API Endpoints

session_log.summary: Set up project scaffolding. Started auth module. Basic login flow working but tests incomplete.
Completed auth module with full test coverage. Started dashboard API basics.
Dashboard API largely working but has timeout issues with large datasets. Started email notifications. Codebase is in clean, compilable state.

notes: Next session should focus on fixing dashboard pagination (feature 2) before moving to feature 3 completion. Feature 4 is blocked until 1 and 2 are fully passing.
